title: 有馬記念の後に・耐え忍びし名将

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I've done it! Yaaaaay!

Her voice, strong and impassioned, echoes
throughout Nakayama.

Meisho Doto surpasses her formidable peers at
last, standing as a shining beacon on the highest
peak!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Impossible! The Overlord, in my most perfect
form, has been unmistakably bested...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, nothing is more satisfying than having
met defeat under these circumstances! It is, in
fact, a miracle—a master class in dramatic twists!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes... yes, yes, yeees! Trainer, I really did it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm strong, and I shine bright! The unconfident me
is nowhere to be seen!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Waaaaah!
choice_data_list: Don't cry. You're supposed to be strong.
Don't cry. You're supposed to be strong.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Waaaaah!

No matter how hard I try to console her, Meisho
Doto's emotions keep flaring up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was a bit unexpected, Grass. I was so
focused on Opera O the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. That was a splendid display of force.
However...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It only reveals our own immaturity. Through all
the agony of her repeated mistakes...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: She remained, never giving up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While the headliner was bathed in the people's
spotlight, a hidden talent stood lurking in her
shadow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By most, she was either ignored or looked down
upon. Except...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There was one person who recognized her talents.
And that someone poured in the time and
attention she would need to blossom into a flower
far bigger than the rest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We would be mistaken to think our defeat today
was a fluke—doing so would result in only
repeated failures.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The evening primrose, grounded by firmly cast
roots, grows so stunningly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This year, the strongest racer, towering above us
all, is, without question, none other than Meisho
Doto.
Later, at the awards ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-h-hello, everyone. I'm Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Today, I ran, I cried, and I said a lot of confusing
things to my trainer. I don't remember it all
clearly, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy that I won. And, um... I have a few
words to say, if that's okay with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've never had much confidence in myself.
Everything I did never seemed to work out...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But the more races I participated in, the more I
came to like myself...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I still don't feel very confident, even with today's
results. That, I think, will take a little while.

To feel confident... The first goal Doto set for
herself is still a long way away.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I say this to say, I'm truly glad I started racing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm clumsy, hopeless, and don't even know when
to give up. I don't have a way with words, either.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But, allow me to say this at the very least!
Meisho Doto takes in a deep breath...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Even if you're at the bottom! Even if you don't
like yourself!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Even if you don't have the teeny-weeniest bit of
confidence!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: There is still hoooope!

She lets out a tempestuous roar while fighting
back tears.

And so, the Umamusume who sought hope at rock
bottom has emerged triumphant, becoming a
beacon of hope for many.
